backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining diagram state types (icons, connections, drawings, lines, text labels, images), user profiles, and CRUD operations for saving/loading/deleting named diagrams with authorization checks.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting three implemented features: free transform tool for moving icons with labels, resize functionality with handles, and visual selection feedback with bounding boxes.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend files including components, pages, hooks, and utilities for threat hunting reports and attack path visualization with transform tool support.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS styles with OKLCH color system variables for light and dark themes, including custom base styles for borders and backgrounds.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Threat Hunting Portal application with root div and module script reference.
frontend/index.ts: Utility snippet demonstrating html2canvas usage for exporting canvas elements to PNG data URLs.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component with TanStack Router setup, Internet Identity authentication flow, profile setup modal, and protected routes for report and attack path pages.
frontend/src/components/AttackPathCanvas: Interactive canvas component managing icon placement, connections, drawings, text labels, and images with free transform tool supporting selection, grouped movement, corner/edge resize handles, and visual feedback.
frontend/src/components/AttackPathConnec: SVG arrow connector component rendering lines between icons with rotation support, arrowheads, selection highlighting, and click handling.
frontend/src/components/AttackPathIcon.t: Renders draggable icons for attack path diagrams, mapping IconType to asset paths and handling drag-and-drop events with fallback to text display.
frontend/src/components/AttackPathToolba: Provides a toolbar for attack path diagram editing with icon selection, drawing tools (pencil, line, arrow, eraser, text), undo/save/load/clear actions, text formatting controls, and image upload functionality with progress tracking.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main application layout component with header navigation (Reports, Attack Path, New Report), user profile display, hero banner on homepage, and footer with Caffeine.ai attribution.
frontend/src/components/LoadDiagramDialo: Dialog for loading saved attack path diagrams, displaying diagram metadata (icon/connection/label counts, last modified date) with delete confirmation and selection functionality.
frontend/src/components/LoginButton.tsx: Renders a logout button when user is authenticated, clearing identity and query cache on click.
frontend/src/components/LoginPage.tsx: Full-page login screen with Internet Identity authentication, displaying security messaging and login button with loading state.
frontend/src/components/MitreTechniqueSe: Searchable combobox for selecting MITRE ATT&CK techniques with custom technique input, displaying technique IDs, names, descriptions, and managing selected/custom technique lists.
frontend/src/components/PdfGeneratorButt: Button component that triggers PDF generation for a report using the print dialog, with loading state and error handling via toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal dialog component that prompts users to enter their name for profile setup on first login, with form validation and submission handling via useSaveCallerUserProfile hook.
frontend/src/components/ReportForm.tsx: Comprehensive form component for creating threat hunt reports with fields for title, author, executive summary, threat actors, MITRE techniques, IOCs, findings, timeline, attack vectors, evidence, affected systems, remediation actions, and recommendations.
frontend/src/components/SaveDiagramDialo: Dialog component that prompts users to enter a name when saving an attack path diagram, with input validation and save/cancel actions.
frontend/src/data/mitreAttackData.ts: Static data file containing MITRE ATT&CK technique definitions organized by tactics (Initial Access, Execution, Persistence, Privilege Escalation) with IDs, names, and descriptions.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that manages the backend actor instance, handling authentication state, identity changes, and automatic query invalidation when the actor is recreated.
frontend/src/hooks/useAttackPathState.ts: Custom hook managing the complete state for attack path diagrams including icons, connections, drawings, text labels, images, drawing tools, undo history, and element selection with CRUD operations.
frontend/src/hooks/useDeleteDiagramState: React Query mutation hook for deleting diagram states by ID, with automatic query cache invalidation on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetAllDiagrams.ts: React Query hook that fetches all saved diagrams for the current user, enabled only when the actor is available.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetCallerUserProfi: React Query hook that fetches the current user's profile, with custom loading state handling that accounts for actor initialization.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetDiagramState.ts: React Query hook that fetches a specific diagram by ID, enabled only when the actor is available and not fetching.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides React context and hooks for Internet Identity authentication, managing login state, identity persistence, and AuthClient lifecycle with configurable options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for report CRUD operations (getAllReports, getReport, saveReport, deleteReport) but all methods are disabled/stubbed since backend no longer supports report functionality.
frontend/src/hooks/useSaveCallerUserProf: React Query mutation hook for saving the current user's profile via the actor, invalidating the currentUserProfile query on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useSaveDiagramState.t: React Query mutation hook for saving diagram state by name, invalidating both diagramState and allDiagrams queries on success.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light/dark theme colors using OKLCH color space, plus custom styles for free transform tool selection boxes and resize handles.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query client and Internet Identity provider, then renders the App component into the root DOM element.
frontend/src/pages/AttackPathPage.tsx: Main attack path diagram editor page managing canvas state (icons, connections, drawings, text, images), toolbar interactions, and save/load/clear operations with confirmation dialogs.
frontend/src/pages/CreateReportPage.tsx: Page for creating new threat hunt reports with a form that submits report data via useSaveReport mutation and navigates to home on success.
frontend/src/pages/ReportDetailPage.tsx: Displays detailed view of a single threat hunt report with sections for executive summary, timeline, attack vector, evidence, affected systems, remediation, and recommendations, plus PDF download functionality.
frontend/src/pages/ReportListPage.tsx: React component that displays a table of threat hunting reports with metadata, MITRE techniques count, IOCs count, and actions (view, download PDF, delete). Includes loading states, error handling, and empty state UI.
frontend/src/types/html2canvas.d.ts: Empty TypeScript declaration file for html2canvas library type definitions.
frontend/src/types/jspdf.d.ts: Empty TypeScript declaration file for jsPDF library type definitions.
frontend/src/utils/pdfGenerator.ts: Utility that generates printable HTML reports from threat hunting data, opening them in a new window with styled sections for metadata, threat actors, MITRE techniques, IOCs, and analysis content.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting, storing, and managing URL parameters and sessionStorage values, supporting both regular query strings and hash-based routing with persistence across navigation.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom color scheme using OKLCH color space, extended theme with sidebar colors, custom animations, typography plugin, and container queries support.
frontend/vite.config.ts: Vite configuration for React app with path aliases, environment variable injection for canister IDs, proxy setup for local API calls, and build optimizations.
project_state.json: Project state tracking file indicating a threat hunting portal application with existing features for free transform tool (move/resize icons and labels) and pending feature requests for diagram manipulation.
